PowerShell(foreach \($q in @\("CSB","DCB","IDFC First","Kotak Mahindra","IndusInd","RBL","Yes Bank"\)\) { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.moneycontrol.com/mccode/common/autosuggestion_solr.php?classic=true&query=$\([uri]::EscapeDataString\($q\)\)&type=1&format=json" -UseBasicParsing; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $first = $j | Select-Object -First 1; Write-Output "$q -> $\($first.name\) | $\($first.link_src\)" })
PowerShell(python -m pip install pdfplumber requests --quiet; python -c "import pdfplumber, requests; print\('ok'\)")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; foreach \($f in @\('Blinkit.png','Client Associates.png','GainPro.png','Highspring.png','Macquarie Group.png','Times of India.png'\)\) { $img = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\(\(Resolve-Path "public\\logos\\$f"\)\); $corner = $img.GetPixel\(0,0\); $center = $img.GetPixel\([int]\($img.Width/2\), [int]\($img.Height/2\)\); Write-Output \("{0}: {1}x{2}, corner A={3} RGB=\({4},{5},{6}\), center A={7}" -f $f, $img.Width, $img.Height, $corner.A, $corner.R, $corner.G, $corner.B, $center.A\); $img.Dispose\(\) })

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "node_modules\\sharp"\) { Write-Output "sharp present" } else { Write-Output "no sharp" }; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\(\(Resolve-Path "public\\logos\\EY.png"\)\); $c = $img.GetPixel\(0,0\); Write-Output \("EY.png: {0}x{1}, corner A={2}" -f $img.Width, $img.Height, $c.A\); $img.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; foreach \($f in @\('Highspring.png','GainPro.png'\)\) { $img=[System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\(\(Resolve-Path "public\\logos\\$f"\)\); $c=$img.GetPixel\(0,0\); Write-Output \("{0}: {1}x{2} cornerA={3}" -f $f,$img.Width,$img.Height,$c.A\); $img.Dispose\(\) })

PowerShell(node -e "const sharp=require\('sharp'\);\(async\(\)=>{const ey=await sharp\('public/logos/EY.png'\).resize\({height:100}\).png\(\).toBuffer\(\);const eyM=await sharp\(ey\).metadata\(\);const toi=await sharp\('public/logos/timesofindia.png'\).resize\({height:142}\).png\(\).toBuffer\(\);const toiM=await sharp\(toi\).metadata\(\);const gap=46;const H=Math.max\(eyM.height,toiM.height\);const W=eyM.width+gap+toiM.width;await sharp\({create:{width:W,height:H,channels:4,background:{r:0,g:0,b:0,alpha:0}}}\).composite\([{input:ey,left:0,top:Math.round\(\(H-eyM.height\)/2\)},{input:toi,left:eyM.width+gap,top:Math.round\(\(H-toiM.height\)/2\)}]\).png\(\).trim\({threshold:1}\).toFile\('public/logos/ey-timesofindia.png'\);const o=await sharp\('public/logos/ey-timesofindia.png'\).metadata\(\);console.log\('ey-timesofindia '+o.width+'x'+o.height\)}\)\(\)")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img=[System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\(\(Resolve-Path "public\\logos\\Blinkit.png"\)\); Write-Output \("Blinkit.png on disk: {0}x{1} cornerA={2}" -f $img.Width,$img.Height,$img.GetPixel\(0,0\).A\); $img.Dispose\(\))
